title: Wildfang® Leather Bones for Dogs - Natural Chew Toys, Dog Toy, Dog Chew Toy for Large Dogs, Dental Care Bone, Leather Toys, L
features: NATURAL AND SAFE MATERIAL- Our leather dog bones are made from natural EU cow leather, sourced from ethical, animal welfare certified farms. The leather is tanned with plant extracts and hand-treated with olive oil and fats to enhance texture and durability. These leather chew toys for dogs provide a safe, eco-friendly alternative to plastic toys. Perfect for aggressive chewers, puppies, and small dogs, our leather dog toys offer hours of safe, non-toxic chewing fun.

DENTAL HEALTH AND STRESS RELIEF- Wildfang leather chew toys for dogs are designed to improve dental health and reduce stress. Dog chewing leather, massage gums, promoting better oral hygiene. The natural chewing action also supports stress relief, making these leather dog chew toys ideal for dogs with anxiety, or teething issues. These leather dog toys for aggressive chewers, puppies, and small dogs provide a soothing, safe chewing experience that also helps maintain a healthy mouth.

ETHICAL AND SUSTAINABLE ALTERNATIVE- This leather chew dog toys offer a safe, eco-friendly, and ethical alternative to plastic chew toys. Crafted from natural, ethically sourced leather, these durable dog chew bones are designed for aggressive chewers while being gentle on teeth and gums. Our leather bone dog toy are long-lasting, non-toxic, and completely safe. These leather chews for dogs help reduce plastic waste, making them the ideal choice for environmentally conscious pet owners.

LONG-LASTING CHEWING FUN - Offering long-lasting entertainment for your dog, these leather dog bones are ideal even for aggressive chewers. These durable dog leather toy are designed to withstand tough chewing without breaking apart easily. The 5mm thick leather is perfect for dogs who love to chew and won’t wear down quickly. Whether you're looking for a dog leather chews, leather dog toy for large dogs, or a leather chew toy puppy, our products provide safe and non-toxic chewing fun.

AVAILABLE IN MULTIPLE SIZES FOR ALL DOGS- Available in three sizes—Small, Medium, and Large— our leather dog toys are suitable for dogs of all breeds, sizes, and ages. Whether you have a small puppy or a large dog, our leather chew bones dogs are the perfect chew toy. These leather chew for dogs are designed for all dogs, including aggressive chewers, puppies, and senior dogs, offering hours of safe, enjoyable chewing with a focus on durability and comfort.
description: Product Description Wildfang Premium Food an Chewables for Dogs! Wildfang stands for a diverse selection of high-quality food , healthy snacks & natural chews - all in premium quality! Here you will find everything that your pet likes to get between the teeth, tastes delicious , is species-appropriate and healthy . Alternative to plastic chews long lasting low calorie hypoallergenic natural patina Stress management and relaxation by chewing on the softer leather chew bone. Wildfang leather bone is an interesting chew toy for your dog. As a real alternative to all plastic chews and especially your beloved shoes, it offers pure and safe playing pleasure for every dog. The special haptics, grip and the typical leather smell provide great interest. Gone are the days of chewed-off shoes in puppyhood and even adult dogs can play to their heart's content. Leather from animal welfare certified farms The leather differs from industrially produced leather both in the production process and in the final treatment. The raw material for the leather bone comes from cows from farms in the EU. It is then tanned with plant extracts , in a natural way and treated with olive oil . Protect your shoes and your dog Chewing on the softer chew will relieve stress and help your dog relax. The material is safe even if the leather bone is broken into many small pieces after playing.
